features.title: Platform capabilities
features.coming_cta: Want priority access to new modules?

core.title: Risk Management
core.desc: Full control over client relationship health in real time.

feats.title: Project Health Score
feats.desc: An integrated score for each project based on sentiment, response time and commitment tracking. From 0 to 100 — always know where things are burning.

feats.title: Sentiment Trend Analysis
feats.desc: A chart of client mood changes over a week, month or quarter. See degradation before the client writes 'we've decided to leave'.

feats.title: Telegram Risk Alerts
feats.desc: Instant Telegram notifications when a client shows signs of dissatisfaction, aggression or loss of trust. PM and manager are notified simultaneously.

feats.title: Predictive Churn Model
feats.desc: AI predicts the probability of client churn based on communication patterns. Gives you time for preventive action rather than firefighting.

feats.title: Risk Playbook
feats.desc: A recommended set of actions for each risk type — tactical or strategic. Not just a signal, but a clear next step.

coming.title: PM Copilot
coming.desc: AI digests, smart reminders and communication recommendations for each PM.

coming.title: Analytics & Insights
coming.desc: PM Communication Score, client pattern analytics and team comparisons.

coming.title: Onboarding Module
coming.desc: Monitoring the first 30 days of a project and an automatic onboarding checklist.

coming.title: Automation
coming.desc: Automatic NPS surveys, reminders and onboarding messages.

security.title: Security & Data Privacy
security.subtitle: Your client communications are protected at every level.

items.title: Data Encryption
items.desc: All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). No open transmission channels.

items.title: Access Control
items.desc: Role-based access control: each team member sees only the projects and data they are authorized for.

items.title: GDPR Compliance
items.desc: The platform meets GDPR requirements. You have full control over what data is stored and for how long.

items.title: Data never trains models
items.desc: Your communications are never used to train AI models. Your data stays yours.

security.contact: Questions about security? Write to security@netpeak-aura.com

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions before the demo.

items.q: How do I connect Telegram or Slack?
items.a: Integration takes 15–30 minutes and requires no technical knowledge. You grant access to the relevant chats via a standard API or bot — Aura connects automatically. We guide you through the entire setup process.

items.q: Do you need access to all chats?
items.a: No. You choose which chats to connect. Aura only analyzes the channels you have explicitly authorized. No hidden connections or monitoring without your knowledge.
Basic connection and setup takes 1 to 3 business days. You will see your first insights and alerts on the very first day after connecting your chats.
Only those you grant access to. Aura has role-based access: managers see all projects, PMs see only their own. Client data is never shared with third parties and is never used to train AI models.

items.q: Is Aura suitable for a small team of 3–5 PMs?
items.a: Yes. Aura scales from small teams to large groups. The Starter plan is designed specifically for companies just beginning to structure their client service. Many clients start with 3–5 PMs and grow with the platform.

items.q: What are tactical and strategic risks?
items.a: Tactical risks are operational issues happening right now: late response, unfulfilled promise, incorrect tone. Strategic risks are signals of relationship degradation: loss of trust, chronic dissatisfaction, potential churn. Aura monitors both levels.

items.q: How do I measure the effect of implementation?
items.a: We provide a baseline report before implementation and compare it with metrics at 30/60/90 days. Key metrics: number of escalations, average sentiment score, PM response time, number of prevented risks.
